section_name: Revocation of Permit in Addition to Other Penalty
chapter_title: Regul. of Outdoor Signs on Rural Roads
text:
(a) A court shall order the revocation of the permit issued under Section 394.022 (Issuance of Permit) that a person holds for a location at which a violation under this chapter occurs if it is shown at the trial of the person for the collection of a civil penalty under Section 394.081 (Civil Penalty) or at an appeal of an administrative penalty under Section 394.082 (Administrative Penalty) that a judgment for a civil penalty, a judgment for an administrative penalty, or a final order for an administrative penalty that was not timely appealed was previously imposed under this chapter against the person.

(b) The revocation of a permit under this section is in addition to any other penalty that may be imposed under this chapter.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 394. Regul. of Outdoor Signs on Rural Roads
##### § 394.083 — Revocation of Permit in Addition to Other Penalty

(a) A court shall order the revocation of the permit issued under Section 394.022 (Issuance of Permit) that a person holds for a location at which a violation under this chapter occurs if it is shown at the trial of the person for the collection of a civil penalty under Section 394.081 (Civil Penalty) or at an appeal of an administrative penalty under Section 394.082 (Administrative Penalty) that a judgment for a civil penalty, a judgment for an administrative penalty, or a final order for an administrative penalty that was not timely appealed was previously imposed under this chapter against the person.

(b) The revocation of a permit under this section is in addition to any other penalty that may be imposed under this chapter.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: A court shall order the revocation of the permit issued under Section 394.022 (Issuance of Permit) that a person holds for a location at which a violation under this chapter occurs if it is shown at the trial of the person for the collection of a civil penalty under Section 394.081 (Civil Penalty) or at an appeal of an administrative penalty under Section 394.082 (Administrative Penalty) that a judgment for a civil penalty, a judgment for an administrative penalty, or a final order for an administrative penalty that was not timely appealed was previously imposed under this chapter against the person.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: The revocation of a permit under this section is in addition to any other penalty that may be imposed under this chapter.
